feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Multiple Royalty Recipients in Condition Contract in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
A company has a royalty agreement with three co-authors for a book title. These authors have different percentages in the royalty sharing. How best do we manage this in the Condition Contract? If we create three suppliers, then how do you put the condition rates in the condition contract? A condition contract in the public cloud can accept only one Royalty Recipient.

Please advise!

entry.title: Selling goods from US Company to Canada, calculate GST,PST and HST for Canada
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus

We sell goods from USA to Canada and collect GST, PST and HST based on Canada Tax Requirements. How we can achieve this in S4 Hana Public cloud ?  (currently SAP is only providing US Sales Tax even if we select Canada Customer)

Also does connection to external tax system like Avalara useful in this scenario?

Regards

Neeraj

entry.title: 在使用Clear G/L Accounting Documents Clear Vendor Invoice with Outgoing Payment 的时候，貌似不支持现有的业务需求
entry.content: 做账的时候，借：预付账款，贷：银行存款  ，但是清账的时候，无法实现，借：xx费用   贷：预付账款

entry.title: Create Customer project screen of custom field make it read only
entry.content: Hi all, In s4 Hana cloud key user Extensibility in screen 'Create Customer Project' or 'Plan Customer Project' we have created custom fields ' Currency Value' and 'Exchange Rate' are should be only make it has Read Only, this is requirement we got currently, we have used 'Adapt UI' , 'Custom fields and logic' and ' Badi' and there is no Badi for read only, the Badi is available only for validations and creation of screen Create customer project of custom field, so there is no option to find for the custom field make it read only. please if any knows this requirement tell me the procedure how do we make it field read only below the comment with screen shots, we are big thankful for who are helping on this requirement, its urgent requirement please expert person tell me the solution as soon as possible. thank you.

entry.title: I need Badi of Purchase Order change
Create New Collection Rules in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
How to create the new Basic Collection Rules in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4HC - Service entry sheet response to Ariba failed in S4 - HTTP Code: 406 ( Not Acceptable)
entry.content:
When we create a Purchase Order (PO) in S4HC and the supplier sends the confirmation and the Service Entry Sheet from Ariba to S4HC. the SES is auto-approved and should send a response back to Ariba. However, this response is failing in S4HC with HTTP Code: 406 (Not Acceptable). Without this response, we're unable to invoice the service.

Can I please get help with this.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud : Create New Company Code.
entry.content:
Dear All

We have activated the Best Practices with Demo Data and Organizational Structure and confirmed all activities within SAP Public Cloud CBC whereas all settings and data have been deployed successfully to starter evaluation system.

Now to check the cross-company code scenarios, we have created a new Company Code, Plant, Sale Organization, Sale Office, Division, Distribution Channel, Storage Locations and Purchase Organization within Organizational Structure Node of CBC system and completed/confirmed the last step. Deployment Status is also showing completed successfully. 

However, within Starter Customizing System , we are not able to view the newly created company codes, plants , sale organizations in any App, except the company code , sale orgs which was available by default with activation of best practices.

Kinly guide, how to move the new created company codes to Starter Customizing system as last step of defining scope in CBC is also having status completed but there is no impact on starter system.

entry.title: S4 HANA CLOUD PUBLIC FORECAST MODEL
entry.content:
Dear S4 Gurus,

We know S4 currently support the following forecasting models:

However we would like to know what each one of them does or whats their full functionality, is this information available somewhere?.

We have browesed all available information on forums and documentation without any luck.

We would really appriciate any help.

 

Best regards.

 

Miguel

entry.title: Custom Fields
entry.content:
We have received business requirement to add New Custom Tab with Custom Fields in the Purchase Requisition. we need help to understand the process steps to add new Tab  and fields and their feasibility.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Account determination for non stock purchase order
entry.content:
When we following the SAP tutorial of "Creating Purchase Order of Services" in 1LE scope item for S4HANA cloud public edition, it shows that the g/l account 51600000 is derived by material group YBMM01. 

We would like to change the predefined g/l account, but we cannot find the relative account determination configuration in IMG. Please advise where can we set this account assignment?

entry.title: How to find the relationship of PR and SO after MRP run
entry.content:
In MRP run, the PR is created but cannot show which sales order is created from. 

The account assignment of PR is empty. So, how can we able to check the PR is created by which SO?

entry.title: how to add custom tab in PR item level in sap cloud public edition using Custom Field or logic app?
entry.content:
Business Requirement -> New Tab addition in PR item level with Multiple custom fields

Environment -> SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition 

App -> Manage Purchase Requisitions – Professional

 

 

 

  1. In the highlighted area business expecting addition of new tab / section (ex. Professional Details)
  2. Inside that new tab we will add custom fields as per requirement
  3. As of now we can be able to add only fields in the existing tab, or we can use available tab/sections in Adapt UI screen.
  4. We want to create new tab/ section, so we can add custom fields there , please help

entry.title: how to solve "Version Indicator is not Activated" for international in during migration of supplier?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

please help to solve below error coming during migration of vendor. How we can check which version indicator maintained here. as in ECC we can use Tcode - SA09. but here in cloud we cant.

Environment -> SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition 

App -> Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit

entry.title: Special Stock - store at OUR location but CUSTOMER assets
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

Please let me know if there is a way to realize this with S/4HANA.

We store some goods in OUR location, but it is CUSTOMER asset.
It means the goods delivered to customers is temporarily stored in our location.

The goods ships from our company upon order from the customer.
It is similar to Special Stock W (Cunstomer consignment stock), but the difference is that it is already recorded as a customer asset.

For the goods of that customer asset, we do not need to manage the amount (amount is 0 yen) and only need to know the quantity.

Is it possible to achieve this by using the Special Stock indicator?

 

Best Regards, 

Haruki SATO

entry.title: I created a custom start condition "Created By" now i need to add a Value help for this condition.
Storage bin determination for synchronous goods receipts
entry.content:
Hi there,
I am currently unsuccessfully trying to influence the process for synchronous goods receipts for purchase orders so that the goods receipt does not take place on the "GR-AREA" as automatically suggested, but on a different storage bin.

What is the logic here? Which settings / configurations does the storage bin determined in this process?

entry.title: ABAP Memory Concept in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have requirement where I need to export internal table data from one BADI and import that data in 2nd BADI implementation. 
I tried below code, Its working if I write both code (Import & Export) in same BADI(which will make no sense), but not working for 2 different BADI. 

How to achieve this in Public cloud.?
Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Is there a API or CDS can retrieve message output of SA JIT/FRC release
entry.content:
Is there a API or CDS can retrieve message output of SA JIT/FRC release

I found a CDS : https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/C_OUTPUTREQUESTITEMDEX

but it can't be used in custom CDS.

entry.title: Budget Availability Control for Cost Centers: Revenue Accounts Do Not Increase Available Budget
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
 
I am experiencing an issue with the budget availability control for cost centers in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (2 SL) and hope you can help identify the cause. Specifically, revenue accounts do not seem to correctly increase the available budget. The behavior is peculiar: While the increased budget from revenue is visible in the cost center budget report, it cannot be utilized for expenditures, such as in a purchase order.
 
To my understanding, the help page implies this functionality:

 

Below you will find my settings and tests in detail (apologies for the length):

1. My Budget Control Profile „NOUSE" :

My profile is using the G/L Account Hierarchy "KST-BDGT" at the root node, ensuring that everything is included. Below is an excerpt:

The following G/L accounts will be used for budget transactions:
  • G/L Account 61003000 (red): Used to create a purchase order to reduce the budget.
  • G/L Accounts 41001000 (green) & 54083000 (orange): Used to calculte the increased budget with a sales order & invoice.

2. My newly created cost center "850-DEMO" (with no previous postings & budget profile active)

3. Adding €100,000 to the cost center "850-DEMO" (as a budget supplement) :

4. Checking that the 100.000€ are availabe on „850-DEMO“ in the cost center budget report:

 Everything looks good so far.

5. Create a Purchase Order with cost center "850-DEMO"

A purchase order with a value of €100,000 can be created (Warning at €100,000; Error at €100,000.01).

6. Checking the budget consumption:

The budget is now €0, as expected.

7. Now, I will create revenue with a sales order and invoice for cost center "850-DEMO."

You can see that €23,456 was created, minus internal price of €5,111.29  resulting in a profit margin of €18,344.71

This is perfectly shown as available budget on the cost center budget report:

So, you would assume that €18,344.71 is available again for spending. But strangely, this is not the case.

 8. Attempting to spend the new budget on a new purchase order:

Error: No budget available. Not even €1 can be spent

 

I don't understand why this is happening. Maybe you can help.

 

Thanks in advance,
 
Simon
